qualityProfile.sourcePolicy: Use licensed or purchased assets only to derive quality criteria; do not imitate a specific asset pack.
principles: Clean functional lane for runtime text or child content
Strong edge separation from busy backgrounds
productionChecks: Clean alpha boundary for transparent assets
No accidental runtime text baked into PNGs
Consistent family logic across related assets

layoutAnatomy.outerDecoration: Use the outer rim, corners, tabs, sockets, and silhouette breaks as the decorative zone.
layoutAnatomy.contentSurface: Keep declared runtime text slots and child-placement areas calm, empty, and low-detail.
layoutAnatomy.boundaryTreatment: Separate the decorative frame from the usable content surface with a clear bevel, inset shadow, highlight rim, or color/material step.
checks: Decoration should frame the content area rather than cover it
Do not add fake labels, rows, icons, or child widgets inside reusable base assets

button.contentSurface: Preserve a clear center label lane for runtime text.
checks: The pressable edge can be ornate, but the label lane stays readable

panel.contentSurface: Keep the interior stable enough for values, labels, or repeated child UI.

card_frame.contentSurface: Leave a broad readable inner area for child content and runtime copy.

promptAdditions: Use polished bevels, intentional rim highlights, and production-ready spacing.

button: Preserve a clear center text lane
background: Keep important UI placement zones calm enough for overlays
Avoid fake UI baked into the background

ambient_backdrop: Provide depth without competing with foreground UI

notes: Use this as a starting template and replace style notes with project-specific direction.
Runtime text should stay in contentOverlays unless an asset explicitly owns baked text.
